MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tm Denis Rice; Clerk: M. Sison; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic is reepresented by Jesus Estrada.
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Brenda Lopez, is present.
Attorney, Jennifer Leung, representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Pro Tem Denis Rice, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
